series_metadata.series_description: Records maintained to organize and track participation and agency spending on government funded (state, federal and grant awards) trainings. Records may include: monthly reconciliations by cost center, training reimbursement invoices, budget records, in-service training and non-credit/credit/workforce development records, tuition reimbursement and any addition records generated for this purpose.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for two (2) federal fiscal years then destroy when no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) federal fiscal years then destroy when no longer of administrative value., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
